name: Ukrainian Statistics MCP Server
what_it_does: Ukrainian Statistics MCP server providing access to official Ukrainian statistical data — demographic statistics, economic indicators, regional data, population figures, and other data from the State Statistics Service of Ukraine (ukrstat.gov.ua). Enables AI agents to query and analyze official Ukrainian government statistical data for research, journalism, and policy analysis.
use_cases: Querying Ukrainian demographic and population statistics from research agents
Analyzing Ukrainian economic indicators and GDP data from economic analysis agents
Accessing regional statistics for Ukraine from policy research agents
Supporting journalism with official Ukrainian government data from newsroom agents
Monitoring wartime economic and demographic data for Ukraine from geopolitical analysis agents
not_for: Real-time conflict or military data (this is official statistical data, not live reporting)
Non-Ukrainian geographic data (use appropriate national statistics MCPs for other countries)
Highly current data — statistical releases have publication schedules
best_when: A researcher, journalist, or analyst needs official Ukrainian government statistical data — demographic, economic, or regional statistics from the State Statistics Service of Ukraine.
avoid_when: You need real-time Ukraine news or conflict data — use news APIs for current events. Statistical data has publication delays.

auth.notes: No authentication required — queries public Ukrainian government statistical data. ukrstat.gov.ua provides open access to official statistics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — uses public government data
pricing.notes: Free access to Ukrainian government open statistical data. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Ukrainian government API rate limits may apply; infrastructure reliability varies

known_agent_gotchas: Ukrainian government servers may have reliability issues especially during conflict period
Statistical data is published on schedules — not all data is current
Data may be in Ukrainian language — implement translation for international use
Community MCP with limited maintenance — verify data freshness before relying on it
Some statistical series may have gaps due to wartime disruptions
Data coverage may be incomplete for conflict-affected regions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public government data — no credentials needed. Data source reliability may vary. No sensitive data involved. Queries public Ukrainian statistics agency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public data. No credentials. Ukrainian government servers. No sensitive data. Reliability may vary given ongoing conflict infrastructure impacts.
